components.content:
• The Pricing Calculator for Amazon Web Services Backup only provides estimates for storage costs in standard backup vaults. Data transfers, restores, Backup Audit Manager reports, GET requests, etc are not included in the Pricing Calculator’s estimates. Please refer to Amazon Web Services Backup’s pricing page for more details.
  • The Pricing Calculator presents a single monthly cost representing an average month during the first year of usage. In practice, costs may change each month due to 1) annual growth rate of protected data, and 2) a 'ramp-up' period during onboarding where new backups are being created but none have started deleting or transitioning to cold storage yet.
  • While cross-region copy and cross-account copy are not directly supported by the pricing calculator, we recommend creating a separate estimate for each backup copy. Your total storage costs will be the sum of the estimates. Logically air-gapped (LAG) vaults are not natively supported in the Pricing Calculator today, but note that backup copies stored in LAG vaults are charged at a 15% premium to storage in standard vaults.
  • If you have a backup plan with multiple rules and the time frames of the two rules overlap, Amazon Web Services Backup optimizes the backup and takes a backup for the rule with the longer retention time. The Pricing Calculator captures this cost optimization for storage equal to the first full backup, however it currently does not currently capture storage optimizations for subsequent incremental backups so your actual costs may vary from the estimates.
  • Any backups in cold storage must be retained in cold storage for at least 90 days. If you delete backups prior to the 90-day minimum, you will be subject to early deletion charges equal to the costs that would have accumulated over the required 90 days. To use cold storage, the backup plan (frequency) must also have at least 1 day of warm storage retention. As the calculator only prices estimates for the first year of usage, the days in warm storage and days in cold storage combined must not exceed 365 days.
  • Amazon Web Services Backup supports incremental backup for select resource types. Please refer to the Amazon Web Services Backup documentation for more details. For more information on your cost estimates for Amazon Web Services Backup, please contact Amazon Web Services Sales Support.

Full snapshots are free as long as they are retained within the continuous backup window. For simplicity, the Pricing Calculator assumes that continuous backups are enabled with 35-day retention.

Additionally, continuous backups are not charged for transaction log storage of up to 100% the size of the protected database.

Continuous backups are always on for Aurora DB clusters. To model this in the pricing calculator, you must configure a continuous backup plan with retention of at least one day.

The total billed usage for the automated backup never exceeds the cumulative cluster volume size over the retention period. For example, if your retention period is 7 days, and your cluster volume was 100 GB every day, then the billed automated backup usage never exceeds 700 GB (100 GB * 7).
